mapper.select: SELECT hp.employee_no AS employeeNo, hp.name_ko AS nameKo, hp.grade_code AS gradeCode, cg.code_name AS gradeName, hp.position_code AS positionCode, COALESCE(cp.code_name, cg.code_name) AS positionName, ce.code_name AS employmentTypeName, cs.code_name AS serviceStatusName, hp.profile_photo_url AS profilePhotoUrl, hp.photo_url AS photoUrl, hp.ai_profile ->> 'summary' AS aiSummary, hd.dept_nm AS deptName, COALESCE(hp.extra_attributes ->> 'role', cp.code_name, cg.code_name) AS dutyName, hp.hire_date AS hireDate FROM hrm_person hp LEFT JOIN common_code cg ON hp.grade_code = cg.code AND cg.parent_code = '102' AND cg.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN common_code cp ON hp.position_code = cp.code AND cp.parent_code = '103' AND cp.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN common_code ce ON hp.employment_type_code = ce.code AND ce.parent_code = '104' AND ce.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN common_code cs ON hp.service_status_code = cs.code AND cs.parent_code = '101' AND cs.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN hrm_org_dept hd ON hp.dept_cd = hd.dept_cd AND hd.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE hp.grade_code IS NOT NULL AND hp.service_status_code = '101-010' ORDER BY COALESCE(cg.sort_order, 9999), hp.employee_no
